bpWarnings.message: Table ConDemoCtrlNote does not have an alternate key
Table ConDemoCtrlNote: the mandatory property DeveloperDocumentation is not specified
Table ConDemoCtrlNote: no form ref is specified

root_cause_hypothesis: CASE BLOCKED — the required deliverable was never produced, so score.build=0 even though the incomplete artifact subset (table + control-less form) compiles clean with 0 errors. The case demands that every visual control be added to an initially control-less form via d365fo_file(action=modify, operation=add-control). That is structurally impossible: the bridge resolves parentControl with FindControlRecursive(design, name) (bridge/D365MetadataBridge/Services/MetadataWriteService.cs:2296 and :2901), which only iterates design.Controls and can never return the design ROOT itself. On a form whose design has no controls, EVERY parentControl value fails, so a form can never receive its first top-level control. Tried 'Design' and the form name; both fail identically, and reproducibly after update_symbol_index and after a successful build. IMPORTANT — this is NOT the historical defect the case was mined from: the AxForm{Type}Control type-resolution bug is genuinely FIXED. Probe (throwaway ConDemoCtrlProbeForm, scaffolded with a Grid, then removed) proved add-control into an EXISTING container works and emits correct XML: i:type="AxFormStringControl", <Type>String</Type>, <DataField>Subject</DataField>, <DataSource>ConDemoCtrlNote</DataSource>. So the remaining blocker is purely design-root addressing. Two further defects surfaced on the same surface. (2) d365fo_file(action=create, objectType=form) silently DROPS the documented properties.dataSource — the emitted form had <DataSources /> empty despite dataSource=ConDemoCtrlNote; had to be repaired with modify add-data-source (same silent-drop shape as the table-side defects in L2-table-modify-lifecycle). (3) the same form create emits <Methods xmlns="" /> with no classDeclaration, so a form created via the bridge NEVER compiles: xppc failed with "Form dynamics://Form/ConDemoCtrlNoteForm: The 'classDeclaration' is missing from element 'ConDemoCtrlNoteForm'". generate_object(mode=scaffold) does emit classDeclaration, so only the d365fo_file create path is affected; modify add-method repairs it and the build then goes green. (4) Diagnostics defect: when FindControlRecursive returns null the TS layer misreports a genuine parent-not-found as "could not resolve form '<name>'" / "the C# metadata bridge could not find it in its metadata model", and its 'Reliable fallback' explicitly recommends d365fo_file(action=create, overwrite=true, xmlContent=...) — i.e. it steers the agent straight into the hand-authored-XML workaround that this very case forbids and that the mined defect report identified as the bad outcome.
suggested_fix_area: (a) bridge MetadataWriteService.AddControl: treat a design-root sentinel (parentControl in {"Design", "", form name, "Root"} or null) as the design itself before recursing, so the first top-level control can be added; FindControlRecursive should also be allowed to return the design container. (b) d365fo_file(action=create, objectType=form) must honour properties.dataSource, or reject it loudly instead of dropping it. (c) the form create path must emit a classDeclaration method ([Form] public class <Name> extends FormRun) so the produced form compiles — currently every bridge-created form is dead on arrival. (d) modifyD365File error mapping: distinguish 'form not found' from 'parent control not found', and never suggest create overwrite=true with hand-authored XML as the remedy for a modify failure.
